title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable and production-ready, not just test-passing. It uses blocker criteria, weighted scores, and maintainer-defined rubrics across code from 36 open-source repositories. The benchmark shows Claude Opus 4.8 leading in code quality across multiple subsets while reporting lower false positive rates than SWE-Bench Pro.
